EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGeometryBridge2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to a set of generic methods that can be used in all languages supported.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A83CAA20-47E4-4A10-AA4C-BB2A25FE7108")]
public interface IGeometryBridge2 : IGeometryBridge
